elements.title: Burmese hare
elements.contents: ... that populations of the Burmese hare (example pictured) may be increasing due to deforestation in Laos?

elements.title: Saudi Arabia were invited to play at two CONCACAF Gold Cups
elements.contents: ... that Saudi Arabia were invited to play at two CONCACAF Gold Cups only eight days after the country was confirmed as the host of the 2034 FIFA World Cup?

elements.title: Angelina Please
elements.contents: ... that trans porn star Angelina Please was credited with saving a life shortly before losing hers at the age of 24?

elements.title: Star Reach
elements.contents: ... that reviewers of Star Reach found it an uninspired mix of several contemporaneous video games?

elements.title: Gelu Voican Voiculescu
elements.contents: ... that Gelu Voican Voiculescu, an esotericist, took pride in securing a death sentence for Romania's last communist leader?

elements.title: The Fate of Ophelia
elements.contents: ... that an AI version of "The Fate of Ophelia" reached number 85 on the Brasil Hot 100?

elements.title: Ottenby Bird Observatory
elements.contents: ... that the Ottenby Bird Observatory has continually conducted bird observations for 80 years?

elements.title: Horizon Call of the Mountain
elements.contents: ... that Horizon Call of the Mountain includes a movement scheme requiring the player to physically swing their arms to simulate walking?

elements.title: saved Rome from becoming a "sheep-pasture"
elements.contents: ... that a letter saved Rome from becoming a "sheep-pasture" in 546?
